title: SonicWall Administrator Login and Configuration Change Audit (SonicWall)
dataSources: `sourcetype=dell:sonicwall` management audit: logins, config commits, firmware
spl:
index=netops sourcetype="dell:sonicwall" earliest=-24h
| where match(_raw,"(?i)login|admin|config|committed|changed|firmware|user.*add")
| stats count by usr, action, host
| sort -count
description: Firewall admin activity is in scope for virtually every cyber framework. Centralizing it supports insider-threat and break-glass reviews.
value: Provides non-repudiation for changes preceding outages or policy weakening.
implementation: Forward admin logs with NTP-synced timestamps. Enrich admin username with HR directory.

references.title: Splunkbase — Dell SonicWall Add-on for Splunk
Splunk Connect for Syslog — Dell SonicWall reference

grandmaExplanation: Firewall admin activity is in scope for virtually every cyber framework — we monitor SonicWall logs so teams can act before users feel pain.
